channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: PAG Viewer - Mon Jun 29 07:57:40 UTC 2026
item.description:
Preview Portable Animated Graphics (.pag) animation files in IntelliJ-based IDEs.
vendor: VincentLeon downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.pagviewer

item.title: En-Ru File Finder - Mon Jun 29 06:40:57 UTC 2026
item.description:
Switch between 'en' and 'ru' folders for the same file. Works with single or multiple file selection, preserves caret position and scroll offset.
vendor: Huginn and Muninn downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: En-Ru-File-Finder
